lines.en_lit: lest one come to separate from the obligated for the exempt or from the exempt for the obligated

Rather, Abaye said: During seven everyone agrees that obligated When they disagree the rest of the days of the year, The Rabbis hold: We issue a decree due to seven and Rabbi Yehuda holds: We do not issue decree,
Rava said to him: But isn’t it taught The sukka the festival on the festival
Rather, Rava said: During the rest of the days of the year, everyone agrees that is exempt When they disagree seven And sukka the reason is discrete, and chamber the reason is discrete.

sukka, the reason is discrete. Rabbi Yehuda to his reasoning, as he said: sukka, we require a permanent residence. obligated in mezuza. The Rabbis to their reasoning, as they say: sukka, we require a temporary residence, not obligated in mezuza.

And chamber, the reason is discrete. The Rabbis hold: A residence involuntarily is considered a residence. And Rabbi Yehuda holds: A residence involuntarily is not considered a residence. instituted by rabbinic law so that will not say: The High Priest is imprisoned in jail,
Who taught As the Sages taught:
